sequence_policy: prefix-major: PM4-1,AQL-1; PM4-3,AQL-3 only after a matched clean prefix
shared_layer_caveat: PM4 and AQL are not wholly independent implementations: they share the frozen generated ISA/code object, KFD/amdgpu, allocations, fixture, and substantial tinygrad runtime code.  A matching outcome does not isolate faults within those shared layers.
